jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
